title: doc: fix misleading Zeroizing claim in doppler module doc
description: The doppler module doc says 'the response body is held in a Zeroizing buffer', which implies the reqwest::Bytes buffer is zeroed. It is not — only the copy moved into SecretValue is zeroed. The vault and gcp-sm module docs honestly acknowledge this with 'The HTTP response buffer from reqwest is not zeroed on drop'. Doppler's doc should say the same to avoid creating a false security impression.
